channel.title: Mindfulness on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in Mindfulness on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: Announce the Reason You Are About to Look at Your Phone
item.description:
I kind of like this idea. Even if you just announce it to yourself I think it’s a great mindful practice.

Announce the Reason You Are About to Look at Your PhonePlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!

Disclaimer: Thoughts and opinions are my own, and do not reflect the views of any employer, family member, friend, or anyone else. Some links may be affiliate links, but I don’t link to anything I don’t use myself.

item.title: Collecting | The Minimalists
item.description:
“Clutter is in the eye of the beholder.”

Podcast 118 | Collecting | The MinimalistsPlease remember to subscribe to the newsletter or feed to stay up to date!
